title: 30pcs Light Yellow 30mm/3cm Large Ribbon Pull Bows for Party Wall, Gift Wraps, Christmas Trees, Wedding, Birthday Hampers Decoration Florist Pullbows
features: [Good quality material]: The gift basket pull bows are made of good quality Polypropylene. You can wipe it clean when it is dirty. It is anti-static, waterproof and sturdy, non-toxic and tasteless, suitable for package ties of gift, craft, bread, cake, flower decoration
[Nice decoration supplies]: Easy to use and you just need to pull the ribbon strings to form a beautiful bow, will not waste your time, and can make your gifts more attractive and eye-catching

[Wide applications]: These mini pull ribbon bows are great for gift wrapping, crafts, baskets, wine bottles and trees. You can use them in wedding, anniversary day, festivals, Christmas party and so on
description: From the manufacturer Gold Ribbon Bows Red Ribbon Bows Elevate your decorating game with our Large 30mm Ribbon Pull Bows. Crafted from durable Polypropylene, they're easy to clean and come in an array of colors. Just pull the strings to create eye-catching bows for gifts, crafts, and more. Perfect for weddings, parties, and festive occasions. Available in various pack sizes to suit your needs. Available in a variety of vibrant colors to match any theme. Perfect for weddings, parties, and festive occasions. Choose from different pack sizes to meet your decorating needs. 30mm/3cm Ribbon Pull Bows for Party Gift Wraps, Christmas Trees, Wedding, Birthday Hampers Decoration Florist Enhance your party, wedding, or special occasion decor with our Large 30mm Ribbon Pull Bows. Crafted from high-quality Polypropylene, these bows are not only anti-static, waterproof, and sturdy but also easy to clean. Simply pull the ribbon strings to create a beautiful bow effortlessly. Whether it's gift wrapping, craft projects, or adding flair to baskets and wine bottles, these bows are versatile and available in a range of vibrant colors to suit any theme. High-quality Polypropylene bows for versatile decoration. Effortlessly create beautiful bows by pulling the ribbon strings. Ideal for gift wrapping, crafts, and enhancing your decor. Available in Multi Color and Multi pack Sizes Colors Available: Gold, Hot Pink, Ivory, Light Blue, Light Pink, Light Yellow, Navy Blue, Orange, Red, White, Purple, Silver Available in Packs of: 10Pcs, 20Pcs, 30Pcs, 40Pcs, 60Pcs
